rootCauseAnalysis.summary: Pod web-frontend is crash-looping (exit code 1, 4 restarts) due to an invalid directive 'invalid_directive: true' in the app-config ConfigMap mounted at /etc/demo-http-server/config.yaml. The application aborts immediately at startup before liveness/readiness probes succeed. The bad ConfigMap was synced to the cluster by ArgoCD from the GitOps repository, making the Git source the authoritative root cause that must be fixed.
contributingFactors: ConfigMap 'app-config' contains an explicitly invalid directive 'invalid_directive: true' that causes the demo-http-server to exit with [emerg]
The bad ConfigMap was applied by ArgoCD (argocd-controller), indicating a misconfiguration was committed to the GitOps repository and synced to the cluster
The application reads the config at startup and immediately aborts — every restart fails within ~1 second (startedAt 02:45:29, finishedAt 02:45:30)
Pod has restarted 4 times and is in CrashLoopBackOff with 1m20s back-off delay, making it fully unavailable
Both liveness and readiness probes never succeed since the process exits before binding to port 8080
